command: manual native PIDFF effect lifecycle plan

source_artifacts.reading: First 1 degree controlled-angle attempt timed out safely at 0.18127718013275285 degrees with 5 successful bounded PIDFF writes, final Stop All, and stable post-stop behavior.
Reviewed bounded-pidff-micro-step-v2 retry timed out safely at the same 0.18127718013275285 degree band with 33 successful bounded PIDFF writes, final Stop All, and stable post-stop behavior.
No-output diagnosis classifies the state as same_response_band_despite_micro_step_replay and requires software-only effect lifecycle planning before any future authorization.
No-output trace decodes the retry as repeated setup/start/Stop-All cycles and compares the first attempt and retry as the same delta band despite lifecycle replay.

profile.name: bounded_pidff_effect_lifecycle_v1
profile.reason: The retry changed write count and repeated the current setup/start/Stop-All lifecycle, but it did not change the measured motion band. The next profile should test a different standard PIDFF effect lifecycle rather than more dwell or more force.
profile.hypothesis: The R5 may need a standard PIDFF effect lifecycle with persistent effect state during the bounded attempt. Repeating Set Effect, Set Constant Force, Effect Operation Start, and Stop All may reset or prevent useful constant-force authority before visible steering displacement accumulates.
proposed_lifecycle: validate steering samples and starting angle before any output
prepare one standard PIDFF effect lifecycle for effect block 1 before the outbound attempt
avoid Stop All between short feedback samples unless a stop condition triggers
start the effect once, then use bounded constant-force updates while steering feedback moves toward the 1 degree target
stop immediately on target reached, timeout, overshoot, wrong-way motion, stale steering samples, write error, or operator abort
send final PIDFF Device Control Stop All exactly once at cleanup and record post-stop stability
standard_pidff_questions_to_answer_in_im: whether the existing Set Effect payload has the intended gain, direction, duration, and trigger fields for this R5 receipt shape
whether Device Gain or Create New Effect should remain omitted or be added only if supported by descriptor-backed standard PIDFF evidence
whether effect block 1 reuse is sufficient without explicit block allocation on this device state
whether constant-force updates after one Effect Operation Start produce a different response than repeated start/Stop All cycles
whether final Stop All cleanup remains ordered last and post-stop stable

requires_before_any_output: generate a no-output dry-run/preflight receipt for the exact profile
make authorize-controlled-angle-output bind the exact profile, lane, device selector, target, max percent, timeout, prior receipts, preflight receipt, planned output path, and bench-clear evidence
add tests that actual writes are rejected without exact authorization
add tests that dry-run opens no HID and sends no writes
add tests that final Stop All is required and direct report 0x20, high torque, serial config, firmware, and DFU remain rejected
record a fresh command-bound bench-clear only after the software implementation and review land
forbidden_next_steps: using Pit House or SimHub as native prerequisites
using passive sniff artifacts as native readiness evidence
notes: This is a no-output plan artifact. It did not open a HID device and did not send output, feature, serial, firmware, or DFU commands.
The profile named here is implemented for software preflight support only and is not authorized for hardware output.
Native visible motion remains unproven until a later dry-run, exact authorization, and output receipt produce a passing receipt.
